query: SELECT e.id, e.title, e.authorId, jp.photoUrl, e.coverImageUrl FROM editorials e LEFT JOIN journalist_profiles jp ON e.authorId = jp.id WHERE e.authorId IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.publishedAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4KgA36nVEkEsaEc.48519a6203d4 --database gZtFuPhj9JU8iVtsGM9iQB --execute SELECT e.id, e.title, e.authorId, jp.photoUrl, e.coverImageUrl FROM editorials e LEFT JOIN journalist_profiles jp ON e.authorId = jp.id WHERE e.authorId IS NOT NULL ORDER BY e.publishedAt DESC LIMIT 5;
